code:
import io
import string
import list

fn abs(_ n: Int) -> Int
  if n < 0
    -n
  else
    n
  end
end

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
mut i = 0
mut best = 0
mut best_abs = 0
mut found = false

while i < tokens.len()
  let tok = match tokens.get(i)
  when Some(t)
    t
  when None
    ""
  end
  match string.parse_int(tok)
  when Some(n)
    if not found
      best = n
      best_abs = abs(n)
      found = true
    else
      let a = abs(n)
      if a < best_abs
        best = n
        best_abs = a
      end
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

println("min_abs=#{best}")
